stemHtml:
A flight from New York JFK is preparing for taxi. Given the following information, what should the crew do?

  • Runway 31L: only 11 000 ft available due to works, currently used for landings only.
  • Runway 31R: 10 000 ft available, used for departures with noise abatement in effect — but too short per the aircraft's TOM calculations.
  • Runway 04L: not available, currently used for landings only.
  • Runway 04R: not in use.

Wind: 230°/15 kt

options.b: Offload one cargo container so the aircraft can depart from runway 31R.
options.c: Wait for ATC to change from runway 31R to 31L.
